title: Somnia - Solar Panels
description: Add solar panels in your world!
body:
Add solar panels and energy generators, generating FE energy to your world. There are 6 solar panels and 4 power generators in this mod.

 

Do not forget to install the CraftTweaker mod and Pipez mod, because there are no initial crafting panels and generators, create them yourself.

 

Attention! To transfer energy to other mechanisms, connect the mechanisms themselves or the wires from the bottom of your solar panel or generator!
